name: grok
description: Use xAI Grok from Codex CLI (and Claude Code) to ask, research (effort=max + web search + --check self-verification), review code, generate images/videos via Grok Imagine, run parallel best-of-N branches, or delegate long-form tasks. Wraps the local `grok` CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Grok, deep-research with web search, code review, image generation, and long-form rescue.
interface.longDescription: Wraps the local xAI Grok CLI so Codex (and Claude Code) can call Grok for: one-off questions, deep research with live web search + self-verification, code review and adversarial review, image and video generation via Grok Imagine, parallel best-of-N branches, and long-form delegated tasks. Bring-your-own xAI auth (browser OAuth via `grok login` or `GROK_CODE_XAI_API_KEY`).
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok a question, run deep research with web search, generate an image, or delegate a long-form task
